title: pelargonium × trinum
intro: Pelargonium × trinum, a hybrid of the pelargonium plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. Also known as 'Trinum Rose', this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × trinum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice for traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory and digestive problems.
